Label.text: These buttons do not have commands registered nor shortcut hints, so only the tooltip configured via the 'tooltip' property is shown.
These buttons have commands registered but no shortcut hints, so the tooltip configured via the 'tooltip' property is shown with the shortcut text in brackets.

code:CodeEditor.value: <Button icon="sap-icon://save" press="cmd:Save" /> <Button text="{i18n>SAP_SAVE}" tooltip="{i18nApp>USER_TOOLTIP}" press="cmd:Save" /> <Button icon="sap-icon://save" tooltip="{i18nApp>USER_TOOLTIP}" press="cmd:Save" />

Panel.headerText: Buttons with Tooltip and Shortcut Hints

Label.text: These buttons have shortcut hints configured via the ShortcutHintsMixin, so the tooltip is shown with the shortcut text in brackets. Note that the shortcut hints are added in the controller.

code:CodeEditor.value: <Button id="b1" icon="sap-icon://save" /> <Button id="b2" text="{i18n>SAP_SAVE}" tooltip="{i18nApp>USER_TOOLTIP}" /> <Button id="b3" icon="sap-icon://save" tooltip="{i18nApp>USER_TOOLTIP}" />

Panel.headerText: Buttons with Commands Registered and Shortcut Hints

Label.text: These buttons have commands registered and shortcut hints configured, so the tooltip is shown with the shortcut text in brackets. Note that the shortcut hints are added in the controller.

code:CodeEditor.value: <Button id="b4" icon="sap-icon://save" press="cmd:Save" /> <Button id="b5" text="{i18n>SAP_SAVE}" tooltip="{i18nApp>USER_TOOLTIP}" press="cmd:Save" /> <Button id="b6" icon="sap-icon://save" tooltip="{i18nApp>USER_TOOLTIP}" press="cmd:Save" /> <Button id="b7" text="{i18nApp>NO_COMMAND}" tooltip="{i18nApp>USER_TOOLTIP}" press="cmd:MyCommand" />
